description_long: This building features a striking combination of architectural styles, with a modern high-rise structure seamlessly integrated with a traditional house at its base. The lower section displays a red hip roof, white walls, and classic window arrangements, while the upper portion rises as a tall, rectangular tower with a flat roof and vertical window strips. The modern section is predominantly white and gray, with large, repetitive window panels and minimal ornamentation. The traditional base includes a prominent front entryway with an arched portico and decorative trim. The overall structure is substantial, likely constructed from reinforced concrete, glass, and brick, with the traditional section possibly using wood framing. This building would be a prominent feature in an urban neighborhood, blending historical and contemporary elements.
description: A large, multi-story building combining a modern high-rise tower with a traditional house base featuring a red hip roof and arched entryway. The structure is predominantly white and gray with vertical window strips and classic architectural details at the lower level.
description_view_0: The front view highlights the traditional house base with a red hip roof, arched entryway, and the tall modern tower rising directly behind it.
description_view_1: The left side view shows the full length of the modern tower, with the traditional house section attached to one end, revealing its windows and roof details.
description_view_2: The rear view focuses on the back of the modern tower, with minimal visible features and a mostly flat, windowed facade.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the modern tower's length and the traditional house section at the opposite end, emphasizing the integration of both styles.
attribute_entryway_design: Arched main entryway with steps, decorative trim, and a small overhang at the base of the traditional section
